ops.title: task wasm/lint fails when Cargo picks Homebrew rustc (no wasm32 std); pin the rustup toolchain via env
ops.body:
In cc-context, `task wasm` (and everything depending on it: build/test/lint) fails when Cargo selects Homebrew's `rustc`, whose sysroot has no `wasm32-unknown-unknown` std. The working fix every lane converged on (2026-07-21):

```sh
env RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable-aarch64-apple-darwin \
  RUSTC=/Users/yasyf/.rustup/toolchains/stable-aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/rustc \
  task wasm   # or task lint / task test
```

**How to apply:** include this env override in any codex/subagent brief that will run task wasm/lint/test in cc-context, or the lane burns a retry rediscovering it. Same brew-shadows-toolchain family as [[stale-goroot-mise-brew]].
